rewritten_requirements: The system shall initialize the Stock Alert Notifier component after loading.
The system shall wait for updates from the Stock Alert Notifier component if its initialization is successful.
The system shall process received updates in the Stock Alert Notifier component.
The system shall unload and terminate the Stock Alert Notifier component upon receipt of a shutdown signal.

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The Stock Alert Notifier component initializes after loading
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: After loading, the component is initialized

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The Stock Alert Notifier component waits for updates if initialization is successful
The Stock Alert Notifier component processes received updates
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When an update is received the Notifier processes the update

source_extracted_requirements.requirement: The Stock Alert Notifier component unloads and terminates when receiving a shutdown signal
source_extracted_requirements.evidence_quote: When the Notifier receives a shutdown it is unloaded and terminates
